## Testing

- [ ] Backend tests: `python -m pytest -q`
- [ ] Frontend lint: `npm run lint`
- [ ] Frontend build: `npm run build`
- [ ] Manual workflow checked, if applicable

## Privacy and Security

- [ ] No `.env`, API keys, SQLite databases, resumes, JDs, or personal data are included.
- [ ] User-facing AI/privacy behavior is documented if changed.
